Assembly: The assembly iyRhoExst1.1 is based on 47x PacBio data and Arima2 Hi-C data generated by the Darwin Tree of Life Project~(https://www.darwintreeoflife.org/). The assembly process included the following sequence of steps: initial PacBio assembly generation with Hifiasm, retained haplotig separation with purge_dups, and Hi-C based scaffolding with YaHS. The mitochondrial genome was assembled using MitoHiFi and OATK. Finally, the primary assembly was analysed and manually improved using rapid curation. Chromosome-scale scaffolds confirmed by the Hi-C data have been named in order of size. the exact length and orientation of the sub-telomeric repeats is unknown.

Description: MAG: Actinomycetota bacterium isolate MFD06157-9B.bin.c.3 genome assembly, chromosome: 1
